title: QFT
description: Quantum Fourier Transform (QFT) algorithm is used to perform the quantum Fourier transform on a quantum state. It is a fundamental building block in many quantum algorithms.

params.help: The number of qubits for the QFT.
params.name: n
state
params.help: The input state for the QFT, represented as a 1D list of complex numbers. If provided, its length must be exactly 2^n.
params.info: 请输入一维数组，长度必须等于2^n（如 n=3 时为 [1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0]）

params.name: inverse
params.help: Whether to perform the inverse QFT.
